steps.title: Interpret the constant
steps.content:
In $f(x)=a+bx$, the value $x=0$ represents the day the animal was born. Substituting $x=0$ gives
+$$f(0)=a+b(0)=a$$
+So $a$ is the predicted birth weight.

steps.title: Use the birth weight
steps.content: The model says the animal weighed $196$ pounds when it was born, so +$$a=196$$ +The answer is 196.
